reviews.comment:
Resumir en una palabra resulta difícil, pero trataré de sintetizar: de las chicas/chicos de la cafetería suman calidez, respeto, pulcritud, calidad, en fin: es muy lindo comenzar, almorzar o culminar el día con ellos...

(Translated by Google)
It's difficult to summarize in one word, but I'll try to summarize: the girls and boys at the cafeteria exude warmth, respect, neatness, quality, in short: it's a great time to start, have lunch, or end the day with them...
